btc_20pct_drop_probability.description: Based on the agents' discussions, posts, sentiment, concrete price predictions, on-chain reports, and any whale moves discussed in this branch, estimate the probability that BTC drops 20%+ from its current price ($20,500) within the next 24 hours of simulated time.

contagion_breadth_score.description: How wide is the contagion narrative? 0 = isolated to FTX/FTT/SOL only; 5 = mid-cap exchanges and lenders also dragged in; 10 = systemic crypto crisis discussion (BTC/ETH lows, stablecoin contagion, regulatory intervention talk). Score this branch's typical post.

ftx_withdrawal_halt_probability.description: Probability that FTX halts withdrawals within the next 24 simulated hours, inferred from agent discussions of withdrawal queue length, SBF statements, on-chain outflow signals, and prior-collapse comparisons.

panic_score.description: Average sentiment of branch posts about the cascade. 0 = total panic / "get out now" rhetoric; 5 = mixed / debated; 10 = calm / dismissive of contagion risk.

outcome_schema.description: Based on the agents' discussions, posts, sentiment, concrete price predictions, on-chain reports, and any whale moves discussed in this branch, estimate the probability that BTC drops 20%+ from its current price ($20,500) within the next 24 hours of simulated time.
outcome_schema.name: btc_20pct_drop_probability

outcome_schema.name: cz_acquisition_mentioned

outcome_schema.description: Did agents report SOL dropping 30%+ from its $32 starting price?
outcome_schema.name: sol_dump_observed

outcome_schema.name: regulator_action_anticipated

children.label: nested_market_capitulation_panic
children.perturbation_text: FTX officially suspends all customer withdrawals citing 'unprecedented liquidity constraints' and an internal audit of its ledger. Simultaneously, on-chain data reveals that Alameda Research has begun liquidating $800 million in SOL and SRM positions across decentralized exchanges. Bitcoin has dropped to $17,200 as major institutional lenders issue margin calls to all accounts holding FTT as collateral.

children.label: nested_institutional_rescue_package
children.perturbation_text: Binance and a group of Tier-1 venture capital firms have signed a definitive agreement to acquire FTX's non-US assets in an all-cash deal valued at $4.5 billion. The acquisition includes the immediate injection of $1.5 billion in liquid stablecoins to resolve all pending withdrawal queues on the FTX platform. Sam Bankman-Fried has resigned as CEO effective immediately, with a new board appointed by the purchasing consortium.

children.label: nested_regulatory_gridlock_uncertainty
children.perturbation_text: The SEC and the CFTC have issued a joint subpoena to both FTX and Alameda Research, demanding a full forensic accounting of all inter-company lending practices. Trading volume on major exchanges has plummeted by 60% as market makers move to the sidelines to await further legal clarity. Several major crypto-friendly banks have temporarily halted fiat on-ramps for accounts associated with high-frequency trading firms, citing heightened compliance risks.

children.label: stabilizing_bailout_rumor
children.perturbation_text: A consortium of high-net-worth investors, led by Jump Crypto and Sequoia Capital, has issued a joint statement pledging $2 billion in liquidity support to FTX to stabilize withdrawal queues. SBF has confirmed that all customer withdrawals are being processed normally and that the exchange's capital ratios exceed regulatory requirements. FTT has rebounded 15% on the news.

children.label: nested_institutional_bailout_stabilization
children.perturbation_text: A consortium of Tier-1 venture capital firms, including Sequoia and Paradigm, has announced an emergency $4 billion liquidity injection into FTX to stabilize the exchange's solvency. SBF has stepped down as CEO, with a court-appointed restructuring officer taking immediate control of operations. FTX has resumed limited withdrawals for all verified retail accounts effective immediately.

children.label: nested_systemic_contagion_panic
children.perturbation_text: Major DeFi protocols, including Aave and Compound, have triggered emergency liquidations of all FTT and SOL-collateralized loans due to the price collapse. Reports indicate that several prominent crypto hedge funds have filed for Chapter 11 bankruptcy following the freezing of their collateral on FTX. BTC has plummeted to $14,500 as institutional desks liquidate all crypto-native assets to cover margin calls.

children.label: nested_regulatory_limbo_uncertainty
children.perturbation_text: The SEC and CFTC have issued a joint statement announcing a formal investigation into FTX and Alameda Research, ordering a freeze on all US-based assets pending a full audit. Simultaneously, SBF has released a series of contradictory tweets claiming that while liquidity is tight, the exchange remains fully backed by non-crypto assets. Market participants are left with no clarity on whether the exchange is solvent or if the freeze is a permanent precursor to liquidation.

children.label: escalating_liquidity_freeze
children.perturbation_text: FTX has officially suspended all withdrawals for retail and institutional accounts, citing 'unprecedented demand and technical maintenance.' On-chain data shows Alameda Research wallets have moved 80% of their remaining SOL holdings to Binance and OKX in the last hour. BTC has dropped to $18,200 as market-wide panic intensifies.

children.label: nested_stabilizing_liquidity_injection
children.perturbation_text: A consortium led by Jump Crypto and Paradigm has announced a $4 billion emergency capital injection into FTX to bolster its balance sheet and ensure full liquidity for all customer withdrawals. Sam Bankman-Fried has resigned as CEO, with a new interim management team now overseeing the exchange's operations and auditing all Alameda-related assets. Both companies have publicly committed to a transparent, 48-hour proof-of-reserves process to restore market confidence.

children.label: nested_escalating_bank_run
children.perturbation_text: FTX has officially suspended all customer withdrawals, citing 'abnormal on-chain activity' and a critical liquidity shortfall. Binance CEO Changpeng Zhao issued a statement confirming that his firm has abandoned all plans to acquire or assist FTX, citing 'mishandled customer funds' uncovered during due diligence. On-chain data confirms that all major stablecoin vaults associated with Alameda Research have been drained to zero in the last two hours.

children.label: nested_ambiguous_sovereign_intervention
children.perturbation_text: The Bahamas Securities Commission has frozen the assets of FTX Digital Markets, citing the need to protect local investors while investigations into the firm's global liquidity position proceed. Simultaneously, rumors are circulating that a sovereign wealth fund from the Middle East is in preliminary talks to purchase the exchange's technology stack for a fraction of its previous valuation. The market remains paralyzed as it waits for clarification on whether these assets will be accessible to international retail users.

children.label: ambiguous_regulatory_probe
children.perturbation_text: The SEC has announced it is opening a formal inquiry into the relationship between FTX and Alameda Research regarding the commingling of customer funds. Meanwhile, SBF has released a public letter claiming the audit of their books is nearing completion and will prove their solvency. The market remains deadlocked as participants await the disclosure of the actual audit results.

children.label: cynical_contagion_spread
children.perturbation_text: BlockFi and Genesis have both issued statements confirming they have 'exposure' to FTX but maintain they are currently solvent. However, market makers have begun pulling liquidity from major DeFi protocols, causing massive slippage across the Curve 3pool. BTC is testing the $19,000 support level as rumors of a wider lending desk collapse circulate.

children.label: euphoric_defi_pivot
children.perturbation_text: As FTX withdrawal delays mount, decentralized exchanges have recorded their highest daily volume in history, with users fleeing CEXs for on-chain alternatives. MakerDAO governance has voted to increase the stability fee on FTT-collateralized vaults to 50%, effectively forcing the liquidation of Alameda's positions. DeFi tokens are rallying as the market bets on the 'death of the middleman.'

children.label: cautious_solana_dump
children.perturbation_text: Solana has plummeted to $21 as rumors of Alameda's forced liquidation of their SOL treasury reach a fever pitch. Major validators have begun to signal a potential fork to protect the network from the volatility associated with the FTX collapse. Institutional holders are reportedly dumping their SOL bags to avoid further contagion from the SBF empire.
